source_pr.title: docs/design: add proposal for restructure tests
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #26023

This pull requests brings the design document for restructure tests, focusing on unit tests and integration tests, especially on separating `integration_test.go` as well as unifying test infrastructure.

### Release note

- No release note
